points.speaker: John
points.text: Staff will update the downtown project listing and distribute it to committee members, coordinating with Edgar to include recent changes discussed.
points.source: John : Yeah, I'll work with Edgar on...Getting that updated...Get that distributed to the committee.

points.speaker: John
points.text: Parks crews conduct daily downtown cleanups and additional weekend cleaning and garbage dumping service was added in the mid-year budget.
points.source: John : ...parks team...they do take a more holistic approach to kind of cleaning up the town and there was staff added in the budget, the mid year budget to add for more weekend cleaning and dumping of garbage as well through throughout the downtown.

points.speaker: John
points.text: Staff will share images of the railing fascia options and instructions for providing feedback with the committee, and will broaden outreach including social media to gather community input on the selected design.

points.speaker: Tony Eagles
points.text: Wild Cherry Lane work will be conducted at night to avoid delivery conflicts since Ontario Lane functions as the delivery access way for restaurants; detours and lane closures will be phased.
points.source: Tony Eagles : ...Ontario Lane does function as the delivery access way for these restaurants...we are suggesting only night time construction for this location...

points.speaker: John
points.text: For future agenda items involving construction, staff will explicitly address business impacts and outreach plans in memos, enabling discussion of mitigations like signage, wayfinding, and parking. The city may leverage DBA volunteers for face-to-face outreach and keep email updates concise for higher engagement.
points.source: John : ...call that out in a memo...from a business lens...Kira Pasca : ...talk about how is this going to impact businesses and what could be done to potentially buffer that impact...Marry Nikki : ...the city can also use the DBA...go from business to business...

points.speaker: Pamela Brewer
points.text: Leadership thanked participants, noted a desire to keep meetings focused and end by 11:30, wished Mary well, and adjourned the session.
points.source: Jamil Shaikh : I think it would really be good if we could really try and stick to what we'll be done by 11:30...Pamela Brewer : Thank you, John, for your time. Thank you everybody...Get well, Mary.

points.speaker: Jamil Shaikh
points.text: Committee members suggested focusing on keeping meetings to 11:30 AM end time to respect participants' business and scheduling commitments.
points.source: Jamil Shaikh : I think it would really be good if we could really try and stick to what we'll be done by 11:30... people have businesses, people have other places ago.
